claims.claim_text: The team's persistence with 'X-factor' bowlers has paid off.
claims.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad bowling coach Varun Aaron said the team’s persistence with 'X-factor' bowlers like Praful Hinge and Sakib Hussain had paid off.
